name: Shell Page Header
description: Page-level header with title, subtitle, and optional action buttons

usageGuidance.when: Page or section needs a title bar with optional subtitle and primary/outline action buttons
antiPatterns: Don't use more than one ShellPageHeader per page
Don't exceed 3 outline buttons - use dropdown for more actions

notes.slots: Use actions slot for custom button layout; or use primaryButton, outlineButton1-3 props
notes.order: Place secondary/outline actions left, primary action right in DOM for visual order
